definition: A system for transferring messages from one computer to another, usually through a network.
example: He sent me his details via email.
exampleVi: Anh ấy đã gửi cho tôi thông tin chi tiết của anh ấy qua email.

definition: A symbol in an alphabet.
example: There are twenty-six letters in the English alphabet.
exampleVi: Có hai mươi sáu chữ cái trong bảng chữ cái tiếng Anh.

definition: A bag or wallet.
example: We need to understand the concept of mail.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thư.

definition: A container in which papers to be dealt with are put.
example: We need to understand the concept of inbox.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hộp thư đến.

definition: A subdivision of currency, equal to one hundredth of an Estonian kroon.
example: We need to understand the concept of sent.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm gửi.

definition: A current of air, usually coming into a room or vehicle.
example: We need to understand the concept of draft.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm dự thảo.

definition: Useless things to be discarded; rubbish; refuse.
example: We need to understand the concept of trash.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm rác.

definition: Likely to be affected by or to experience something.
example: He's subject to sneezing fits.
exampleVi: Anh ấy hay bị hắt hơi.

definition: One who receives.
example: My e-mail never reached the intended recipient.
exampleVi: Email của tôi không bao giờ đến được người nhận như dự kiến.

definition: Someone who sends.
example: The package was addressed to someone we didn't know, so we returned it to the sender.
exampleVi: Gói hàng được gửi đến một người mà chúng tôi không biết, vì vậy chúng tôi đã trả lại cho người gửi.

definition: To fasten, to join to (literally and figuratively).
example: An officer is attached to a certain regiment, company, or ship.
exampleVi: Một sĩ quan được gắn vào một trung đoàn, đại đội hoặc tàu nhất định.

definition: The act or process of (physically or figuratively) attaching.
example: We need to understand the concept of attachment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm gắn bó.

definition: (initialism) Carbon copy.
example: We need to understand the concept of cc.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cc.

definition: Initialism of body-centered cubic.
example: We need to understand the concept of bcc.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bcc.

definition: A written or spoken response; part of a conversation.
example: We need to understand the concept of reply.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trả lời.

definition: One of the eight players (comprising two props, one hooker, two locks, two flankers and one number eight, collectively known as the pack) whose primary task is to gain and maintain possession of the ball (compare back).
example: We need to understand the concept of forward.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phía trước.

definition: (rarely countable) Unsolicited bulk electronic messages.
example: I get far too much spam.
exampleVi: Tôi nhận được quá nhiều thư rác.

definition: A person's name, written by that person, used as identification or to signify approval of accompanying material, such as a legal contract.
example: We need to understand the concept of signature.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chữ ký.

definition: Direction.
example: We need to understand the concept of address.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm địa chỉ.

definition: An act of stamping the foot, paw or hoof.
example: The horse gave two quick stamps and rose up on its hind legs.
exampleVi: Con ngựa giậm nhanh hai tiếng rồi đứng dậy bằng hai chân sau.

definition: A place for storing earlier, and often historical, material. An archive usually contains documents (letters, records, newspapers, etc.) or other types of media kept for historical interest.
example: We need to understand the concept of archive.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lưu trữ.

definition: The act of conveying something.
example: The delivery was completed by four.
exampleVi: Việc giao hàng đã được hoàn thành bởi bốn.

definition: A device which separates a suspended, dissolved, or particulate matter from a fluid, solution, or other substance; any device that separates one substance from another.
example: We need to understand the concept of filter.

definition: A change of direction of motion after hitting the ground or an obstacle.

definition: A footgoer; pedestrian
example: We need to understand the concept of footer.
